name: WB Stripping Buffer (Mild)

notes.en: Adjust pH to 2.2 with HCl. Incubate at 37°C for 10–15 min × 2, then wash with TBST 3 × 10 min, then re-block.
notes.zh: 用 HCl 调 pH 至 2.2。37°C 孵育 10–15 min × 2 次，然后 TBST 洗 3 次 × 10 min，重新封闭。

ref: Bhatt et al. (2012) Methods Mol Biol 869:29–40

storage.notes: Contains reducing agent; prepare in fume hood

usage.en: Western blot membrane stripping buffer for antibody removal and membrane re-probing.
usage.zh: WB 膜剥脱缓冲液，用于去除抗体后重新探针。

prepSteps.step: Dissolve SDS (2%) and Tris-HCl (62.5 mM) in ~800 mL ddH₂O.
Add β-mercaptoethanol (100 mM) fresh before use.
prepSteps.warning: β-mercaptoethanol is toxic — use in fume hood.

prepSteps.step: Bring to final volume of 1000 mL.
Use immediately; do not store with β-ME added.
